zh.lifeSummary: Richard Harnage Esq於大約1455年出生在英國史洛普爾紹頓。他於大約1486年與Mrs. Richard Harnage在英國史洛普爾紹頓結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Harnage Esq于大约1455年出生在英国史洛普爾紹頓。他于大约1486年与Mrs. Richard Harnage在英国史洛普爾紹頓结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Harnage
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Harnage in Shropshire, which has as its second element Old English ecg ‘edge, steep ridge’; the first is uncertain but may be a derivative, hæren ‘rocky’, of an unrecorded Old English hær ‘stone’. The surname now appears to be extinct in England; in the US it is concentrated in FL and GA.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Harnage Esq was born about 1455, in Shotton, Shropshire, England. He married Mrs. Richard Harnage about 1486, in Shotton, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Harnage Esq est né environ 1455, à Shotton, Shropshire, Angleterre. Il a épousé Mrs. Richard Harnage environ 1486, à Shotton, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Harnage Esq wurde um 1455 in Shotton, Shropshire, England geboren. Er hat um 1486 in Shotton, Shropshire, England Mrs. Richard Harnage geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Harnage Esq è nato il circa 1455 nel Shotton, Shropshire, England. Lui sposato Mrs. Richard Harnage circa 1486, nel Shotton, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Harnage Esq(은)는 대략 1455년 영국 슈럽실르 쇼턴에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1486년 영국 슈럽실르 쇼턴에서 Mrs. Richard Harnage(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Harnage Esq nasceu aproximadamente 1455, em Shotton, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Richard Harnage aproximadamente 1486, em Shotton, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Harnage Esq родился около 1455 г. в местности шоттон, шропшир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Richard Harnage около 1486 г. в местности шоттон, шропшир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Harnage Esq nació aproximadamente 1455, en Shotton, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Mrs. Richard Harnage aproximadamente 1486, en Shotton, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
